s1.title: Introduction
s1.p: At GateFlow, we take your privacy and the security of your facility's data seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you use our marketing website and services.

s2.title: Information We Collect
s2.p1: This includes information you provide when you fill out our contact form, request a demo, or sign up for our services (e.g., name, email address, phone number, company name).
s2.p2: We collect information about how you interact with our website, such as your IP address, browser type, and the pages you visit.

s3.title: How We Use Information
s3.l1: To provide and maintain our services.
s3.l2: To communicate with you regarding your inquiries or service updates.
s3.l3: To improve our website performance and user experience.
s3.l4: To comply with legal obligations and security audits.

s4.title: Data Residency
s4.p: For our enterprise customers in the MENA region, we offer data residency options in Egypt, UAE, and KSA to comply with local data protection regulations.

s5.title: Security
s5.p: We implement enterprise-grade security measures, including HMAC-signed data and AES-256 encryption, to protect your data from unauthorized access.

s6.title: Contact Us
s6.p: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at hello@gateflow.io.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.p: By accessing or using the GateFlow services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

s2.title: 2. Service Description
s2.p: GateFlow provides a QR-based access control management platform, including mobile scanning applications and cloud-based administration dashboards.

s3.title: 3. Use of Service
s3.l1: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
s3.l2: You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes related to facility security management.
s3.l3: You must not attempt to circumvent any security measures or cryptographic protections implemented by the service.

s4.title: 4. Pricing and Payment
s4.p: Service fees are billed according to the plan selected (Starter, Pro, or Enterprise). Failure to pay may result in service suspension.

s5.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
s5.p: GateFlow is not liable for any security breaches resulting from improper gate hardware installation or compromised user credentials at the organization level.

s6.title: 6. Modifications
s6.p: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

security.title: Security Infrastructure
security.intro: GateFlow is built on a zero-trust architecture. We prioritize the integrity of your perimeter access through enterprise-grade cryptographic standards and hardened cloud infrastructure.

aes.title: AES-256 Encryption
aes.desc: All data at rest is encrypted using AES-256 with PBKDF2 key derivation. Sensitive resident data is never stored in plain text.

hmac.title: HMAC-SHA256 Signing
hmac.desc: QR codes are cryptographically signed. Any modification to a ticket results in an immediate denial at the gate.

s1.title: Infrastructure Security
s1.l1_text: Our servers are hosted in SOC2 Type II compliant data centers.
s1.l2_text: Regional data hosting available for Egyptian and Gulf customers.
s1.l3_text: DDoS mitigation and web application firewalls (WAF) protect all API endpoints.

s2.title: Application Security
s2.p: Our scanner app is designed for offline-first resilience. Even if the network is compromised or down, the gate logic remains secure as it validates signatures locally on the hardware.

s3.title: Compliance & Audits
s3.p: GateFlow generates permanent, tamper-proof audit logs for every scan and administrative action. We support regular security reviews for our Enterprise partners.

s1.title: What are cookies?
s1.p: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device by websites that you visit. They are widely used to make websites work, or work more efficiently, as well as to provide information to the owners of the site.

s2.title: How we use cookies
s2.p: GateFlow uses cookies for the following purposes:
s2.l1_text: Necessary for the website to function, such as authentication and language preference persistence.
s2.l2_text: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.
s2.l3_text: Allow the website to remember choices you made in the past, like what language you prefer.

s3.title: Managing cookies
s3.p_start: Most web browsers allow some control of most cookies through the browser settings. To find out more about cookies, including how to see what cookies have been set, visit

s4.title: Updates to this policy
s4.p: We may update our Cookie Policy from time to time. We encourage you to periodically review this page for the latest information on our cookie practices.
